articles.title: SEC Accuses Crypto Giant Justin Sun And Lindsay Lohan Of Securities Law Violation
articles.description: The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has recently announced that it has charged Justin Sun, a prominent crypto entrepreneur, and his three companies- Tron Foundation, BitTorrent, and Rainberry Inc, with allegedly conducting an unregistered sale of “crypto assets securities.” The SEC alleges that Sun and his companies offered and sold Tronix (TRX) and BitTorrent […]

articles.title: SEC sues Justin Sun and eight celebrities, including Akon, Ne-Yo for Fraud
articles.description: Crypto entrepreneur Justin Sun and three of his companies, Tron Foundation Limited, BitTorrent Foundation Ltd., and Rainberry Inc., have been … Continued

articles.title: Ripple Relocates 120,000,000 XRP After 35% Rally This Week: On-Chain Data
articles.description: Ripple Labs is moving hundreds of millions of XRP tokens after the crypto asset sparked a 35% move to the upside this week. According to new on-chain data from whale-surveying service Whale Alert, the payments firm suddenly moved 120,000,000 XRP, worth about $58 million at the time of its transfer, from Ripple to an unknown […]

articles.title: Users On Telegram Can Send USDT To Each Other Via Chats: Report
articles.description: Summary: Telegram users can now send and receive USDT transactions within chats on the messaging app, CoinDesk reported citing an email from the social network giant. USDT was added to the platform’s Wallet marketplace, joining other cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Toncoin. The messaging app has been linked with crypto adoption since the TON project was launched in 2018 by founders Parel Durov...

articles.title: Telegram Users Can Now Transfer USDT Through Chats
articles.description: USDT has been added to Telegram's @wallet bot, expanding the messaging app's facility for buying and selling crypto.

articles.title: Tether CTO on USDC depeg: ‘Bitcoin maxis were right all along’ | PBW 2023
articles.description: Paolo Ardoino said that recent events in the crypto space demonstrate that Bitcoiners were right and that Bitcoin is the “ultimate way” to hold wealth.

articles.title: Gaming project Aavegotchi to release own blockchain with Polygon Supernets
articles.description: Gaming project Aavegotchi revealed plans to launch its own blockchain called Gotchichain in the third quarter of this year.

articles.title: Nimiq integrates gas-abstracted USDC transactions on Polygon
articles.description: The new feature from Nimiq aims to simplify stablecoin payments without requiring Polygon's native matic tokens for transaction fees.

articles.title: XRP shoots 20% in 24 hours as optimism around SEC case grows

articles.title: Monero Founder Refutes Allegations of Helping Interpol Trace Funds
articles.description: Monero founder Riccardo Spagni has quashed claims that he has been an informant who helped Interpol and other federal agencies trace funds.

articles.title: Korean gaming giant Nexon to work with Polygon for MapleStory Universe NFTs
articles.description: Cute and on-chain: the massive MapleStory franchise will enter Web3 with its own dedicated Supernet on Ethereum scaling network Polygon.

articles.title: US Government Attacks Bitcoin In New Report While Promoting A CBDC
articles.description: US President Joe Biden released the government’s economic report on Monday, in which Bitcoin plays a major role. BTC is mentioned as many as 75 times in the report, which attempts to denigrate Bitcoin and promote a Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) of the United States as the better solution. articles.title: Crypto Fear and Greed Index Surges to Highest Level This Year Amid Rising Optimism
articles.description: The Crypto Fear and Greed Index, which serves as an aggregate for investor confidence and attitude towards the market has reached its highest level this year, indicating growing optimism and confidence among cryptocurrency investors. The index which ranges from 0 to 100 and is based on factors such as volatility and trading volume, has surged […]
